name: ogh-monorepo
description: OGH content platform monorepo with React frontend and PocketBase backend

scripts.dev: concurrently --kill-others --raw "npm run dev --prefix apps/web" "npm run dev --prefix apps/pocketbase" "npm run dev --prefix apps/admin-api"
scripts.start: concurrently --kill-others --raw "npm run start --prefix apps/pocketbase" "npm run start --prefix apps/admin-api"
